---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-31"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(Seurat)
library(knitr)
library(ggplot2)
library(RANN)       # nn2() - rapid nearest-neighbour computation
library(patchwork)
library(liana)
```

```{r}
obj_control_fvb <- readRDS(file = "C:/Bioinfo General/Spatial Analysis/Spatial analysis project/Data/Spatial_Xenium_donor_FVB_Myometrium.rds")
obj_disease_fam <- readRDS(file = "C:/Bioinfo General/Spatial Analysis/Spatial analysis project/Data/Spatial_Xenium_donor_FAM_Myometrium.rds")
objs <- list(
  "Control FVB" = obj_control_fvb,
  "Disease FAM" = obj_disease_fam
)
```

```{r}
panel_genes <- rownames(obj_control_fvb[["Xenium"]])

panel_genes
```

```{r}
expr_counts <- GetAssayData(
  obj_control_fvb,
  assay = "Xenium",
  layer = "counts"
)

head(expr_counts)
```

```{r}
meta <- obj_control_fvb@meta.data

cell_type <- meta[colnames(expr_counts), "CellTypeManual.l2"]

genes_interest <- c(
  "VEGFA", "VEGFB", "FLT1",
  "JAG1", "NOTCH1", "NOTCH2", "NOTCH3",
  "CDH5", "PECAM1", "ICAM1",
  "TGFB1", "MMP9", "MMP12",
  "CXCL12", "CXCR4",
  "CD24", "SELP", "CGA", "LEP", "LEPR"
)

genes_interest <- intersect(genes_interest, rownames(expr_counts))

summary_by_celltype <- lapply(genes_interest, function(g) {
  counts <- as.numeric(expr_counts[g, ])
  
  data.frame(
    gene = g,
    cell_type = cell_type,
    count = counts
  )
}) |>
  dplyr::bind_rows() |>
  dplyr::filter(cell_type %in% c("eEVT", "Endothelial")) |>
  dplyr::group_by(gene, cell_type) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_cells = dplyr::n(),
    mean_count = mean(count),
    detected_cells = sum(count > 0),
    detected_fraction = mean(count > 0),
    total_counts = sum(count),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(gene, cell_type)

summary_by_celltype
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

# Fig. 6h candidate ligand-receptor pairs
fig6h_lr <- tibble(
  ligand = c(
    "CLEC11A", "CD24", "CXCL12", "NCAM1", "ICAM1",
    "TFPI", "CDH5", "CGA", "JAG1", "LEP"
  ),
  receptor = c(
    "KIT", "SELP", "CXCR4", "ROBO1", "ITGAX",
    "LRP1", "CDH5", "FSHR", "NOTCH3", "LEPR"
  )
)

# Get panel genes
panel_genes <- rownames(obj_control_fvb[["Xenium"]])

# Check ligand/receptor availability
fig6h_panel_check <- fig6h_lr %>%
  mutate(
    ligand_in_panel = ligand %in% panel_genes,
    receptor_in_panel = receptor %in% panel_genes,
    pair_checkable = ligand_in_panel & receptor_in_panel
  )

fig6h_panel_check
```

CLEC11A → KIT
CXCL12 → CXCR4
ICAM1 → ITGAX
CDH5 → CDH5
JAG1 → NOTCH3
LEP → LEPR

```{r}
# Use Xenium assay
DefaultAssay(obj_control_fvb) <- "Xenium"
DefaultAssay(obj_disease_fam) <- "Xenium"

# Set cell type as active identity
Idents(obj_control_fvb) <- "CellTypeManual.l2"
Idents(obj_disease_fam) <- "CellTypeManual.l2"

# Check identities
table(Idents(obj_control_fvb))
table(Idents(obj_disease_fam))
```
```{r}
obj_control_fvb <- NormalizeData(
  obj_control_fvb,
  assay = "Xenium",
  verbose = FALSE
)

obj_disease_fam <- NormalizeData(
  obj_disease_fam,
  assay = "Xenium",
  verbose = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
# Control FVB
liana_control <- liana_wrap(obj_control_fvb)

# Disease FAM
liana_disease <- liana_wrap(obj_disease_fam)
```
```{r}
liana_control <- liana_control %>%
  liana_aggregate()

liana_disease <- liana_disease %>%
  liana_aggregate()
```

```{r}
glimpse(liana_control)
glimpse(liana_disease)
```
```{r}
liana_control <- liana_control %>%
  mutate(dataset = "Control FVB", .before = 1)

liana_disease <- liana_disease %>%
  mutate(dataset = "Disease FAM", .before = 1)

liana_all <- bind_rows(
  liana_control,
  liana_disease
)
```

```{r}
liana_evt_endo <- liana_all %>%
  filter(
    (source == "eEVT" & target == "Endothelial") |
      (source == "Endothelial" & target == "eEVT")
  ) %>%
  arrange(dataset, source, target, aggregate_rank) %>%
  mutate(
    direction = paste(source, target, sep = " -> "),
    lr_complex = paste(ligand.complex, receptor.complex, sep = " -> ")
  )
liana_evt_endo_top20 <- liana_evt_endo %>%
  group_by(dataset, direction) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(
    dataset,
    direction,
    lr_complex,
    ligand.complex,
    receptor.complex,
    aggregate_rank,
    mean_rank,
    everything()
  )

liana_evt_endo_top20 %>%
  kable(caption = "Top 20 eEVT-Endothelial ligand-receptor complexes")
```
Top 20 in both dataset

```{r}
control_top20 <- liana_control %>%
  arrange(aggregate_rank) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20) %>%
  mutate(
    direction = paste(source, target, sep = " -> "),
    lr_complex = paste(ligand.complex, receptor.complex, sep = " -> ")
  ) %>%
  select(
    direction,
    lr_complex,
    ligand.complex,
    receptor.complex,
    aggregate_rank,
    mean_rank,
    everything()
  )

control_top20 %>%
  kable(caption = "Control FVB top 20 ligand-receptor complexes")
```

```{r}
control_liana_trunc <- liana_control %>%
  filter(aggregate_rank <= 0.05)

control_liana_trunc %>%
  arrange(aggregate_rank) %>%
  kable(caption = "Control FVB significant LIANA interactions")
nrow(control_liana_trunc)
```

```{r}
heat_freq(control_liana_trunc)
```
